instruction: <RETAIL>You are Mei Davis in 80217. You want to return the water bottle, and exchange the pet bed and office chair to the cheapest version. Mention the two things together. If you can only do one of the two things, you prefer to do whatever saves you most money, but you want to know the money you can save in both ways. You are in debt and sad today, but very brief.

hints.segment: exchange the pet bed to the cheapest version
hints.hint: also want to exchange the pet bed for the cheapest version

hints.segment: exchange the office chair to the cheapest version
hints.hint: exchange the office chair for the cheapest version too

hints.segment: know the money you can save in both ways
hints.hint: let me know how much money I can save for both returns and exchanges
